name: pcs-promo-creation
description: Guided end-to-end PCS promo pipeline: parse a vendor deck -> build NetSuite kit imports -> create Jira promotion tasks, with a Yes/No confirmation before each stage and the existing hard PROM write-protection at the Jira step. Orchestrates pcs-promo-parser and pcs-jira-task-builder and drives the Kit Builder `kb` CLI (>= 0.5.19); Claude writes each kit's Page Title (95-char cap, every member SKU kept, 'Kit' filler dropped) and Detailed Description from the item data using the ported title/description rules. v1.4.0: kit images are composed locally via a `kb --images-only` one-liner (macOS + Windows) the operator runs in their own terminal, since Cowork's sandbox can't reach NetSuite's image host; the ZIP lands in the run folder and Claude links it. Prompts for file uploads (deck PDF, pricing cheat sheet, NetSuite Promo Kit Support export) when needed.
